title: Compose Development, Overrides, Profiles, Watch, and Test Workflows · Image and Runtime Lens: Docker Compose Files Merge Reset
summary: Developers need fast source sync and optional debugging while CI needs isolated dependencies, deterministic tests, and no production-only side effects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the docker compose files merge reset increment in development and test Compose workflow matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Merge base, development, test, and local Compose files while predicting mapping, sequence, reset, replace, and path resolution behavior.
Predict pull, build, create, recreate, start, attach, stop, down, orphan, anonymous volume, and named volume effects before lifecycle commands.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern

Render every file combination and isolate disposable state. Competency probe: Merge base, development, test, and local Compose files while predicting mapping, sequence, reset, replace, and path resolution behavior. A defensible solution applies Docker Compose Files Merge Reset, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to development and test Compose workflow matrix.

content.code:
# Worked focus: docker-compose-files-merge-reset — Merge base, development, test, and local Compose files while predicting mapping, sequence, reset, replace, and path resolution behavior.
  # Evidence: docker-worked-docker-compose-development-testing-3
  - competency: docker-worked-docker-compose-development-testing-3
    artifact: compose.dev.yaml
    decision: worked docker compose development testing 3
    scenario-variant: 2
    environment: IPv6-enabled Compose project on a shared CI runner
    fault-injection: rebuild after the approved base digest is withdrawn
    retained-proof: accessible recovery runbook with rollback rehearsal timing
    case-key: worked3
    change: |
      services:
      api:
      develop:
      watch:
      - action: sync
      path: ./src
      profiles: [dev]
      test:
      profiles: [test]
    verify: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.dev.yaml config --profiles
    failure: Reject production bind mounts, hidden override precedence, watch-triggered dependency churn, or a profile that changes the core dependency contract.
    repair: Render every file combination, scope development-only state, select sync versus rebuild deliberately, and prove test teardown is isolated.
content.caption: Runnable Docker artifact and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
